plan_metadata.name: Feature DA Through Treeview For MetaOS AddIn Extendsion

steps.description: Click the "Office Add-in" option in the "New Project" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.

Click the "Task pane" option in the "Select a capability" dropdown within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code. The red crosshair indicates selection of the highlighted dropdown item.
Click the "Default folder" path field in the "Workspace Folder" dialog inside Visual Studio Code to select the project root directory (`/home/.../AgentsToolkitProjects`).
Click the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit item in the VS Code Explorer panel within the workspace, highlighting the toolkit extension icon and tooltip.
Click the "Extend to Declarative Agent" option under the DEVELOPMENT section in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit sidebar of Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Default folder /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects" option in the "Workspace Folder" selection dialog within Visual Studio Code.
Enter 'a' into the "Input an application name" text field in the Visual Studio Code development workspace.
Type ${{var:app_name:vscuse_app_#####}} into the command palette search box at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface.
Press the Enter key to confirm the application name in the "Input an application name" text field within the Visual Studio Code extension interface.
Click the "appPackage" folder in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code to expand or select it.
